statement: In every magma, Equation 4119 (`x * y = ((x * x) * x) * z`) implies Equation 3532 (`x * y = x * ((z * y) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0599
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op x x) x) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op x (op (op z y) x))
